patterns.name: Django Raw SQL Query
patterns.description: Raw SQL queries should be parameterized

patterns.name: Flask Debug Mode in Production
patterns.description: Debug mode enabled in likely production code

patterns.name: Missing CSRF Protection
patterns.description: Flask routes should have CSRF protection
patterns.fix_template: Add @csrf.exempt or implement CSRF protection with Flask-WTF

patterns.name: Synchronous HTTP Call in Async
patterns.fix_template: Use httpx.AsyncClient or aiohttp for async HTTP calls

patterns.name: Large File Read in Memory
patterns.description: Reading entire file into memory may cause issues with large files
patterns.fix_template: Use chunked reading or iterate over file object

patterns.name: Missing Timeout on HTTP Request
patterns.description: HTTP request without timeout can hang indefinitely
patterns.fix_template: Always specify timeout parameter: requests.get(url, timeout=30)

patterns.name: Bare Exception Catch
patterns.description: Catching all exceptions without specifying type
patterns.fix_template: Catch specific exception types: except ValueError as e:

patterns.name: Print Statement Instead of Logging
patterns.description: Using print() instead of proper logging
patterns.fix_template: Use logger.info() or logger.debug() from the logging module
